requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — ANOR / ARSEL Requirements for EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——ANOR / ARSEL对电动汽车充电桩的要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——ANOR / ARSEL對電動汽車充電樁的要求

summary.en: Cameroon's national standards body ANOR (Agence des Normes et de la Qualité) adopts IEC standards as the basis for national standards (Normes Camerounaises, NC). EV charging equipment sold or installed in Cameroon is therefore expected to comply with IEC 61851-1 for general conductive charging system requirements, covering control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, and emergency stop provisions where applicable. IEC 61851-23:2023 (second edition) addresses DC EV charging stations. ARSEL, as the electricity sector regulator, oversees installation safety for new electrical installations. ANOR's PECAE (Programme d'Evaluation de la Conformité des produits Avant leur Exportation vers le Cameroun) is the pre-shipment import conformity programme for products including electrical equipment imported into Cameroon. Outdoor EV chargers in Cameroon's tropical climate require robust IP ratings for protection against heat, humidity, and heavy rainfall; IP55 or higher is prudent for outdoor AC installations and IP54 or higher for DC stations.
summary.zh: 喀麦隆国家标准机构ANOR（规范与质量局）以IEC标准为基础制定国家标准（喀麦隆国家标准，NC）。在喀麦隆销售或安装的电动汽车充电设备因此须符合IEC 61851-1通用传导充电系统要求，涵盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流及过温保护，以及适用时的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023（第二版）适用于直流电动汽车充电站。ARSEL作为电力部门监管机构，负责监督新增电气装置的安装安全。ANOR的PECAE（出口前喀麦隆产品合格评定计划）是针对进口至喀麦隆产品（包括电气设备）的出口前进口合格评定计划。在喀麦隆热带气候下，户外电动汽车充电桩须具备强健的IP防护等级以抵御热、湿和强降雨；户外交流安装建议IP55或更高，直流充电站建议IP54或更高。
summary.zht: 喀麥隆國家標準機構ANOR（規範與質量局）以IEC標準為基礎制定國家標準（喀麥隆國家標準，NC）。在喀麥隆銷售或安裝的電動汽車充電設備因此須符合IEC 61851-1通用傳導充電系統要求，涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流及過溫保護，以及適用時的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023（第二版）適用於直流電動汽車充電站。ARSEL作為電力部門監管機構，負責監督新增電氣裝置的安裝安全。ANOR的PECAE（出口前喀麥隆產品合格評定計劃）是針對進口至喀麥隆產品（包括電氣設備）的出口前進口合格評定計劃。在喀麥隆熱帶氣候下，戶外電動汽車充電樁須具備強健的IP防護等級以抵禦熱、濕和強降雨；戶外交流安裝建議IP55或更高，直流充電站建議IP54或更高。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment (second edition)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) — IP55 recommended for outdoor AC in tropical climate, IP54 for DC
ANOR — Agence des Normes et de la Qualité du Cameroun — IEC standard adoption programme (anor.cm)
ANOR PECAE — Programme d'Evaluation de la Conformité des produits Avant leur Exportation vers le Cameroun

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements, in force April 2024), which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is useful as a design starting-point reference but does not substitute for IEC 61851-accredited test reports required under ANOR/PECAE or by an ARSEL-authorised installation inspection. A clause-level gap analysis between GB/T 18487 and IEC 61851-1 is needed before claiming equivalence.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可作为设计起点参考，但不能替代ANOR/PECAE或ARSEL授权安装检查所要求的IEC 61851认可实验室测试报告。在声称等效性之前，须完成GB/T 18487与IEC 61851-1的逐条差距分析。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可作為設計起點參考，但不能替代ANOR/PECAE或ARSEL授權安裝檢查所要求的IEC 61851認可實驗室測試報告。在聲稱等效性之前，須完成GB/T 18487與IEC 61851-1的逐條差距分析。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (in force April 2024)

gap.en: Exporters should prepare: (1) an IEC 61851-1 clause compliance matrix; (2) accredited IEC safety test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory; (3) IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products; (4) IP55+ (outdoor AC) / IP54+ (DC) tropical-climate enclosure test certificates covering humidity and rainfall resistance; (5) thermal derating evidence for Cameroon's tropical ambient temperatures (sustained 35–40 °C, with peak exceedances); (6) protective device ratings; (7) ANOR PECAE conformity documentation for the import; (8) bilingual French/English installation and safety instructions. A standalone GB/T 18487 test report is not accepted as IEC 61851 compliance evidence without a clause-level gap assessment. Exporters should verify with ANOR the current PECAE requirements for EV chargers before shipment.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备：(1) IEC 61851-1逐条合规矩阵；(2) ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC安全测试报告；(3) 直流产品的IEC 61851-23证据；(4) 覆盖湿度和降雨防护的IP55+（户外交流）/ IP54+（直流）热带气候外壳测试证书；(5) 针对喀麦隆热带环境温度（持续35至40°C，伴有峰值超限）的热降额证据；(6) 保护器件额定值；(7) 进口的ANOR PECAE合格评定文件；(8) 法语/英语双语安装和安全说明。单独的GB/T 18487测试报告在未完成逐条差距评估的情况下，不被视为IEC 61851合规证据。出口商在出货前应向ANOR核实电动汽车充电桩的现行PECAE要求。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備：(1) IEC 61851-1逐條合規矩陣；(2) ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC安全測試報告；(3) 直流產品的IEC 61851-23證據；(4) 覆蓋濕度和降雨防護的IP55+（戶外交流）/ IP54+（直流）熱帶氣候外殼測試證書；(5) 針對喀麥隆熱帶環境溫度（持續35至40°C，伴有峰值超限）的熱降額證據；(6) 保護器件額定值；(7) 進口的ANOR PECAE合格評定文件；(8) 法語/英語雙語安裝和安全說明。單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告在未完成逐條差距評估的情況下，不被視為IEC 61851合規證據。出口商在出貨前應向ANOR核實電動汽車充電樁的現行PECAE要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under ANOR IEC-aligned standards and PECAE pre-shipment conformity for imported electrical equipment; ARSEL authorisation is required for installation; IP rating and tropical thermal compliance are project and safety requirements
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence in Cameroon without additional accredited testing and clause-level gap assessment

source.publisher: ANOR — Agence des Normes et de la Qualité du Cameroun

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Cameroon-facing EVSE documentation must include IEC 61851-1 accredited evidence, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, IP-rated enclosure certificates validated for tropical conditions (heat, humidity, rainfall), thermal derating review, and ANOR PECAE conformity documentation. Bilingual French/English documentation is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向喀麦隆的EVSE文件必须包括IEC 61851-1认可证据、直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据、经热带条件（热、湿、降雨）验证的IP防护等级认证书、热降额审查，以及ANOR PECAE合格评定文件。须提供法语/英语双语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向喀麥隆的EVSE文件必須包括IEC 61851-1認可證據、直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據、經熱帶條件（熱、濕、降雨）驗證的IP防護等級認證書、熱降額審查，以及ANOR PECAE合格評定文件。須提供法語/英語雙語文件。
